case_title: KING, BRIAN SAMUEL vs. JOHN W. KING SENIOR CENTER, INC., A

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN W. KING SENIOR CENTER, INC., A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION $691.79 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $784.79
